subject_need: Keep self-hosting release state synchronized after each release
alternative_solutions: introduce a canonical active release manifest and require key operator surfaces to resolve through it
extend organization-verify with release-state drift checks only
non_solution_options: document manual post-release cleanup steps and keep runtime read-only
defer_options: accept release-state drift until a later major version
stop_options: do not create a release-state project if the drift cannot be shown to affect operator-facing runtime outputs
